description_long: This handbag features a boxy, geometric design with a structured rectangular body made from a combination of brown and dark blue materials. The main compartment is sandwiched between two thick, brown panels, with a series of dark blue and beige blocks forming a decorative band around the center. A single, sturdy black strap arches over the top, attached at both ends to the brown panels, suggesting it is designed for shoulder or hand carrying. The handbag is accompanied by several matching block-like accessories or components, some of which appear to be removable or openable, adding to its modular aesthetic. The overall look is modern and minimalist, with a focus on clean lines and contrasting colors. No visible logos or decorative embellishments are present, emphasizing its utilitarian and contemporary style.
description: A modern, boxy handbag with a structured brown and dark blue body, accented by a black strap and modular block-like components. Its minimalist design features clean lines and a geometric aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the handbag's rectangular body, central decorative band of beige and blue blocks, and the black strap arching above, with modular accessories arranged in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the brown panels, the vertical alignment of the strap, and the blocky accessories, including an open beige compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the uninterrupted brown panel and the continuation of the blue band, with the strap visible at the top and a block accessory to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the vertical structure of the handbag, the attachment points of the strap, and the modular blocks, including a closed blue accessory.
attribute_strap_type: Single long black strap, suitable for shoulder or hand carrying, non-adjustable, attached at both ends to the top brown panels.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Panel or lid closure, likely magnetic or snap-based, integrated into the top brown section of the handbag.
attribute_pattern: Geometric block pattern with alternating beige and dark blue segments; no printed or embroidered patterns.
